name: Speedometer Source
subtitle: Home of Speedometer, a simple GPS speed tracker for iOS
description:
This is the AltStore Source for Speedometer.

A simple GPS speed tracker that shows current speed and can track average speed.

apps.name: Speedometer
apps.subtitle: Simple GPS speed tracker
apps.localizedDescription: A simple GPS speed tracker for iOS. Shows current GPS speed and can track average speed over a period of time.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Speedometer needs your location to measure your current speed.
